question: How do I set up VPN access?
final_answer: To set up VPN access, go to `https://my.jh.edu` and log in with your JHED ID. Navigate to **IT Downloads** > **Cisco AnyConnect VPN**, download the client for your operating system (Windows, macOS, Linux), and then launch Cisco AnyConnect and connect to `vpn.jhu.edu`.

plan: Go to: https://my.jh.edu and log in with your JHED ID.
Navigate to IT Downloads > Cisco AnyConnect VPN and download the client for your operating system (Windows, macOS, Linux).
Launch Cisco AnyConnect and connect to vpn.jhu.edu.
